stories.headline: OpenAI CFO Says Company May Raise More Capital as Compute Crunch Deepens
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar signaled the company may raise additional capital beyond its record $122 billion round as a compute shortage is the primary constraint on growth.

pull_quote.text: We are going up a vertical wall of demand right now. When we are not hitting targets, it is lack of compute that often is the thing that is slowing us down.

stories.headline: Nvidia Partners With Ineffable Intelligence to Build Next Frontier of AI Superintelligence
stories.key_takeaway: Nvidia engineering-level partnership with Ineffable Intelligence signals reinforcement learning at scale is the chip giants bet on where frontier AI goes after LLMs.

pull_quote.text: Researchers have largely solved the easier problem of AI: how to build systems that know all the things humans already know. But now we need to solve the harder problem.

stories.headline: Martha Stewarts AI Startup Hint Raises Seed Funding to Manage Your Home Before Things Break
stories.key_takeaway: Hint raised a $10M seed round led by Slow Ventures to build an AI-native home management platform that proactively surfaces maintenance guidance.

pull_quote.text: The more Hint learns about your home, the more the system can do without human intervention.

stories.headline: DesignVerse Raises $5.5 Million to Modernize Europes Air Traffic Management With AI
stories.key_takeaway: DesignVerse collapsed a 6-month EUROCONTROL legacy modernization job into just over a month and already hit $1.1M ARR in under five months.

pull_quote.text: Software generated by AI must integrate with existing architectures and run safely in production. Our models are designed specifically for those constraints.

stories.headline: Multiverse Raises $70 Million to Future-Proof Workforces for the AI Era
stories.key_takeaway: Multiverse $70M raise at $2.1B valuation positions it as the bridge between AI capabilities and enterprise workforce adoption.

pull_quote.text: Getting outcomes from AI and unlocking productivity is not just a technology problem. It is a people problem.

stories.headline: Google I/O 2026 Sets Stage for Gemini Intelligence Era With Android XR and Googlebooks
stories.key_takeaway: Google is reframing Android as an intelligence system and deploying Gemini across every hardware surface simultaneously.

pull_quote.text: We are transitioning from an operating system to an intelligence system.

stories.article_excerpt: Google is not waiting for its biggest developer conference of the year to make a splash. In a sweeping pre-I/O...

stories.headline: Mira Muratis Thinking Machines Reveals Real-Time Multimodal AI Interaction Models
stories.key_takeaway: Thinking Machines Lab Interaction Models reframe the AI interaction problem as architectural, splitting live conversation and background reasoning into two dedicated models.

pull_quote.text: Most labs treat autonomy as the goal and interactivity as scaffolding around a turn-based core. We think the way we work with AI matters as much as how smart it is.

stories.headline: Runway Pivots From Video Generation to World Models as Annual Revenue Hits $160 Million
stories.key_takeaway: Runway is using its profitable AI video business as a launchpad for world models targeting robotics, drug discovery, and climate.

pull_quote.text: Language models are trained on the entire internet. But to get beyond that, we need to leverage less biased data.

stories.headline: Googles TurboQuant Algorithm Slashes LLM Memory Overhead in Breakthrough at ICLR 2026
stories.key_takeaway: TurboQuant compresses LLM KV cache to 3 bits per element, achieving 6x memory reduction and up to 8x attention speedup with zero accuracy loss and no retraining.

pull_quote.text: TurboQuant can quantize the key-value cache to just 3 bits without requiring training or fine-tuning and without causing any compromise in model accuracy.

stories.article_excerpt: The KV cache the silent tax every large language model pays to remember what it has already read is getting a...

stories.headline: Penn Researchers Introduce Mollifier Layers for More Stable and Efficient Neural Networks
stories.key_takeaway: Penn Mollifier Layers module cuts training time and memory by 6-10x and lifts fourth-order PDE correlation from 0.17 to 0.84 with zero added parameters.

pull_quote.text: Solving an inverse problem is like looking at ripples in a pond and working backward to figure out where the pebble fell.

stories.headline: University of Hawaii Unveils Physics-Informed ML Algorithm for Climate and Fluid Dynamics

sources.name: Journal of the American Statistical Association

stories.key_takeaway: A UH-linked physics-informed deep learning framework embeds governing PDEs directly into training, producing physically consistent fluid simulations at dramatically lower computational cost.

pull_quote.text: One of the risks of climate change for Hawaii is extreme weather events, and current scientific models are poor at estimating these risks. This project will provide a completely new approach.

stories.article_excerpt: A new generation of machine learning models grounded in the laws of physics is reshaping how scientists simulate...

stories.headline: Google Warns Malicious Web Pages Are Actively Hijacking AI Agents via Prompt Injection
stories.key_takeaway: Google confirmed a 32% surge in malicious prompt injection payloads on the public web between Nov 2025 and Feb 2026, including PayPal transaction hijacks.

pull_quote.text: We expect both the scale and sophistication of attempted IPI attacks to grow in the near future.
pull_quote.attribution: Thomas Brunner, Yu-Han Liu, Moni Pande

stories.headline: AI-Generated Deepfake CEO Video Enables $2 Million Wire Transfer Fraud
stories.key_takeaway: Real-time AI deepfake video has eliminated the last reliable defense against executive impersonation fraud while regulatory responses remain dangerously behind.

pull_quote.text: When your CFOs face and voice appear on a video call asking for an urgent wire, the cognitive override that fraud training depends on simply does not activate.

stories.article_excerpt: A finance director received what appeared to be an urgent video call from her companys CEO last month. The face was...

stories.headline: Vatican Prepares Sweeping AI Ethics Framework Addressing Work Inequality and Human Dignity
stories.key_takeaway: Pope Leo XIV signed his first encyclical on May 15 2026, positioning the Catholic Church as a major moral voice in global AI governance.

pull_quote.text: AI could be used to perpetuate marginalization and discrimination, create new forms of poverty, and worsen existing social inequalities.

stories.article_excerpt: On May 15, 2026, exactly 135 years after his namesake Pope Leo XIII signed Rerum Novarum, the landmark encyclical on...

stories.headline: UK Regulators Issue Joint Guidance on Agentic AI Consumer Law and Competition Risks
stories.key_takeaway: UK CMA and DRCF confirmed existing consumer law fully applies to agentic AI and deploying businesses bear direct legal liability with fines up to 10% of global turnover.

pull_quote.text: Businesses remain responsible for what their AI agents do, in the same way as they are responsible for the actions of their employees.
pull_quote.role: Agentic AI Consumer Law Guidance, March 2026
